Modal.wrapper: DialogContent max-w-4xl p-0 overflow-hidden bg-white gap-0
Modal.header: px-6 py-4 border-b border-slate-100 flex justify-between items-center bg-white sticky top-0 z-10
Modal.title: text-lg font-semibold text-slate-900

Tabs.list: w-full justify-start border-b border-slate-200 bg-transparent p-0 h-auto rounded-none
Tabs.trigger: data-[state=active]:border-primary data-[state=active]:text-primary data-[state=active]:shadow-none border-b-2 border-transparent rounded-none px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-slate-500 hover:text-slate-700 transition-colors bg-transparent

Card.base: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl shadow-sm overflow-hidden
Card.header: px-5 py-3 border-b border-slate-100 bg-slate-50/50 flex justify-between items-center

Input.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-white file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-500 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-primary focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 transition-all duration-200

Button.secondary: bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 shadow-sm

Documents.list_item: flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors group

instructions_to_main_agent: Use .js and .jsx extensions for files, NOT .ts or .tsx.
Implement the 'Customer Details Modal' using the Shadcn Dialog component.
Use the 'Tabs' component for switching between Customer Info, Vehicles, and Documents.
Ensure all inputs have labels and proper spacing.
For the Vehicles tab, use a Card-based layout for each vehicle instead of a wide table if possible, or a very clean table if data is dense.
For the Documents tab, create a clean list view with upload buttons.
Use the defined color palette: Primary #2E3192, Secondary #6366F1.
Ensure the modal is responsive and fits within the viewport (max-h-[80vh] with overflow-y-auto).
Do NOT use gradients for backgrounds; stick to clean white and slate surfaces.
Preserve all existing functionality: Edit/Save for customer, Add/Delete/Refresh for vehicles, Upload/View/Delete for documents.
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI slop' aesthetics; focus on professional, high-trust design.
Use generous padding (p-6, p-8) to reduce congestion.
Use specific transitions (e.g., transition-colors duration-200) instead of 'transition-all'.
Do not center-align text in forms; keep it left-aligned for readability.
Use 'sonner' for toast notifications if needed.
Ensure high contrast for text against backgrounds.
